description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in autonomous mode was stopped at a stop sign waiting for traffic to clear to make a left turn from northeast 
bound King Street onto 7th Street in San Francisco. A passenger car (Vehicle 2) was stopped  directly behind the Zoox vehicle apparently in 
the process of turning right onto 7th Street. As the Zoox vehicle advanced and then came to a stop as it yielded to cross traffic, the passenger
 car tried to pass the Zoox vehicle on the right side and contacted the Zoox vehicle. The front bumper on the passenger car and rear bumper 
on the Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage. There were no reported injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
